assertions.assertion: Configures both AddJwtBearer and AddOAuth2Introspection handlers
Uses ForwardReferenceToken (via Selector.ForwardReferenceToken) to route reference tokens to the introspection handler
The scheme name passed to ForwardReferenceToken matches the scheme name used in AddOAuth2Introspection
assertions.rationale: Both use 'introspection' as the scheme name

assertions.assertion: Sets ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' on the JWT bearer handler

assertions.rationale: Response includes dotnet add package command for Duende.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer
